operating_ranges.evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver (AR) via solenoid valve (Y1) to loading plunger (LP) and unloading valve (UV)

fault_conditions.name: solenoid_valve_malfunction
fault_conditions.description: Solenoid valve out of order preventing compressor loading or unloading
fault_conditions.symptoms: Compressor starts running but does not load after delay time, or compressor does not unload and safety valve blows
fault_conditions.evidence: Solenoid valve (Y1) out of order. Replace valve.

maintenance_actions.name: solenoid_valve_replacement
maintenance_actions.evidence: Replace valve when solenoid valve (Y1) out of order

assumptions.statement: Solenoid valve Y1 controls pneumatic signals for loading/unloading operations
assumptions.reason: Manual shows Y1 as loading solenoid valve that controls air flow to loading plunger and unloading valve
Manual describes valve plunger returning by spring force when de-energized and moving upwards against spring force when energized
